description_long: This modern bungalow features a striking rectangular design with a flat roof and a prominent use of black and white exterior finishes. The front facade is minimalist, with large windows and a clean, geometric entrance pathway flanked by palm trees. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious outdoor area, including a large swimming pool, sun loungers, and a shaded patio with outdoor furniture. The property is enclosed by a sleek black fence, providing privacy and a contemporary aesthetic. The upper level includes a balcony overlooking the pool, while the ground level seamlessly connects indoor and outdoor living spaces. The overall layout emphasizes open space, luxury, and modern architectural lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with black and white finishes, large windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and patio. The design is minimalist and luxurious, with open outdoor living areas and palm landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the minimalist entrance, large windows, and palm trees flanking the pathway.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the elongated layout, upper balcony, and the full extent of the backyard with pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, sun loungers, shaded patio, and open backyard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the pool, patio, and the connection between the outdoor and indoor areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and rear windows
